facial_scans.diagnosis: Skin shows mild oiliness and some uneven texture.
Overall healthy skin profile. Slight sensitivity detected. Recommend introducing calming ingredients like niacinamide and ceramides.

chat_messages.text: My skin feels very oily even after cleansing, what should I do?
Based on your oily skin profile and latest scan, I recommend switching to the Niacinamide 10% + Zinc serum to better control sebum production. Would you like me to update your routine?
